title: Permission scope chip
description: Colour-coded chip for a permission's scope suffix (.own, .team, .branch, .tenant, .any, ...). Includes an explanatory tooltip so users understand what each scope means. Widest chip = widest scope (.any, red); narrowest chip = narrowest scope (.own, green).

props.contentExpr: ({ any: 'Cross-tenant — platform-admin only', tenant: 'Everything in the current tenant', organization: 'Within the current organization', region: 'Within the current region', branch: 'Within the current branch', team: 'Within teams you coach or play on', child: 'For your linked child athletes (guardian scope)', own: 'Only rows you own' }[props.scope])

variant.$expr: ({ any: 'danger', tenant: 'warning', organization: 'info', region: 'info', branch: 'accent', team: 'accent', child: 'success', own: 'success' }[props.scope])
